semantic.content: Acme maintains SOC 2 Type II certification.
Acme completes annual third-party compliance audits.

episodic.content: In this RFP session, the user requested certification and audit frequency details.

procedural.content: When sharing compliance evidence, require NDA execution before releasing full audit reports.

semantic.content: Acme standard SLA target is 99.9 percent monthly uptime.
Critical incidents are acknowledged within 1 business hour.

episodic.content: In this RFP session, the user requested uptime and incident response commitments.

procedural.content: When answering SLA questions, include uptime percentage, credit policy trigger, and incident acknowledgment timeline.

semantic.content: Customer data is retained for 30 days after termination unless earlier deletion is requested.
Encrypted backups are retained for 35 days.

episodic.content: In this RFP session, the user requested retention and deletion policy specifics.

procedural.content: For data lifecycle responses, provide termination retention window and backup retention period explicitly.

semantic.content: Typical enterprise implementation duration is 4 to 6 weeks.

episodic.content: In this RFP session, the user asked for onboarding timeline and staffing details.

procedural.content: Implementation narrative should follow discovery, ingestion, validation, and UAT milestones.
State that delivery manager and solutions engineer are assigned for enterprise onboarding.

semantic.content: Enterprise pricing starts at 6000 USD per month for up to 50 users.
Additional users cost 85 USD per user per month.
Professional services onboarding is a one-time 12000 USD fee.

episodic.content: In this RFP session, the user requested pricing and onboarding fee details.

procedural.content: For pricing responses, include base plan, overage unit price, and one-time onboarding fee.

semantic.content: Acme integrates with Slack, Google Drive, and Microsoft 365.
Slack ingestion uses OAuth and preserves channel metadata.

episodic.content: In this RFP session, the user requested integration and Slack ingestion details.

procedural.content: When documenting integrations, list supported connectors and the authentication method per connector.
